priceSnapshot.note: Prices are researched estimates from specific product pages or pricing references. They are a static snapshot for this student project, not live pricing.
priceSnapshot.priceDisclaimer: Actual prices may be higher or lower depending on retailer, brand version, sales, stock, tax, and shipping.

parts.name: AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
parts.reason: Good budget CPU that still handles games and school work fine.
parts.compatibility: Needs an AM4 motherboard and DDR4 RAM.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: Intel Core i5-14400F
parts.reason: Solid Intel CPU for school, work, and content tasks.
parts.compatibility: Needs an LGA1700 motherboard and a graphics card.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: AMD Ryzen 5 7600x
parts.reason: Great starter AM5 CPU with strong performance and room to upgrade later.
parts.compatibility: Needs an AM5 motherboard and DDR5 RAM.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D
parts.reason: Top-end CPU for gaming, content, and heavy multitasking.
parts.compatibility: Needs an AM5 motherboard, DDR5 RAM, and strong cooling.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: AMD Radeon RX 6600
parts.reason: Good low-cost graphics card for 1080p gaming.
parts.compatibility: Works with modern PCIe motherboards and a decent 650W PSU.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: AMD Radeon RX 9060 XT 16GB
parts.reason: Good value card with enough VRAM for newer games.
parts.compatibility: Works with modern PCIe motherboards and a quality 750W PSU.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT
parts.reason: Strong 1440p card without going crazy on price.
parts.compatibility: Works with modern PCIe motherboards and a quality 750W PSU.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 SUPER
parts.reason: Good choice when gaming and content work both matter.
parts.compatibility: Works with modern PCIe motherboards and a quality 750W or 850W PSU.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: ASUS ROG Astral GeForce RTX 5090 32GB
parts.reason: This GPU is overkill in the best way. It can handle basically anything.
parts.compatibility: Needs a big case, strong airflow, and a high-wattage PSU.
parts.priceNote: Estimated street price. This card can be way higher or lower depending on seller and stock.

parts.name: ASUS Prime B550M-A WiFi II
parts.reason: Simple AM4 board with WiFi for a budget build.
parts.compatibility: Works with AM4 Ryzen CPUs and DDR4 RAM.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: Gigabyte B650 Eagle AX
parts.reason: Good AM5 board with WiFi and upgrade room.
parts.compatibility: Works with AM5 Ryzen CPUs and DDR5 RAM.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: MSI B760 Gaming Plus WiFi
parts.reason: Good Intel board with WiFi and DDR5 support.
parts.compatibility: Works with LGA1700 Intel CPUs and DDR5 RAM.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: ASUS ROG Crosshair X870E Hero
parts.reason: Premium ROG board for a no-budget AM5 build.
parts.compatibility: Works with AM5 Ryzen CPUs and DDR5 RAM.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: OLOy Black Owl 16GB DDR4-3200
parts.reason: Enough RAM for a starter build without killing the budget.
parts.compatibility: Needs a DDR4 motherboard.
parts.priceNote: Budget estimate. DDR4 prices have been weird, so the real price may move a lot.

parts.name: G.Skill Flare X5 32GB DDR5-6000
parts.reason: 32GB is a nice sweet spot for gaming and multitasking.
parts.compatibility: Needs a DDR5 motherboard.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. RAM prices are moving a lot right now.

parts.name: G.Skill Flare X5 64GB DDR5-6000
parts.reason: More RAM for content work, multitasking, and heavier projects.
parts.compatibility: Needs a DDR5 motherboard.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. High-capacity DDR5 can change a lot by sale and stock. DDR5 RAM Prices are ridiculous at the moment.

parts.name: Crucial P3 Plus 1TB NVMe SSD
parts.reason: Fast 1TB storage for Windows, apps, and games.
parts.compatibility: Needs an open M.2 slot on the motherboard.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock. As of now, stock is hard to come by at retail price due to resellers

parts.name: Crucial P3 Plus 2TB NVMe SSD
parts.reason: 2TB gives more space for games, files, and projects.
parts.compatibility: Needs an open M.2 slot on the motherboard.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock. As of now, stock is hard to come by at retail price due to resellers

parts.name: Crucial P3 Plus 4TB NVMe SSD
parts.reason: A lot of fast storage for big games and creative files.
parts.compatibility: Needs an open M.2 slot on the motherboard.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price (Reseller). Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock. As of now, stock is hard to come by at retail price due to resellers

parts.name: CORSAIR CX650M Semi-Modular Low-Noise
parts.reason: Basic reliable power supply for a starter build.
parts.compatibility: Good for entry-level GPUs like the RX 6600.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: Corsair RM750e 750W Gold Modular
parts.reason: Good 750W PSU for clean mid-range gaming builds.
parts.compatibility: Good fit for GPUs like the RX 7800 XT.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: Corsair RM850e 850W Gold Modular
parts.reason: More power headroom for stronger GPUs and upgrades.
parts.compatibility: Good fit for higher-end GPUs and creator builds.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: ASUS ROG Thor 1200W Platinum III
parts.reason: Big power supply for the no-budget monster build.
parts.compatibility: Good match for very high-end GPUs like the RTX 5090.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change a lot by seller and stock.

parts.name: Montech AIR 100 ARGB
parts.reason: Cheap case with airflow and some style.
parts.compatibility: Best for micro-ATX boards; check GPU length before buying.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: Montech AIR 903 MAX
parts.reason: Good airflow case with room for bigger parts.
parts.compatibility: Supports ATX boards and larger GPUs; still check GPU length.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: ASUS ROG Hyperion GR701
parts.reason: Huge premium case with room for the big ROG build.
parts.compatibility: Good for large GPUs, E-ATX boards, and 360mm cooling.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: Thermalright Peerless Assassin 120 SE
parts.reason: Great budget air cooler that gets the job done.
parts.compatibility: Works with common AMD and Intel sockets; check case height.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: ARCTIC Liquid Freezer III Pro 360
parts.reason: Strong 360mm cooler without needing a fancy screen.
parts.compatibility: Needs a case with 360mm radiator support.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.

parts.name: ASUS ROG Ryujin III 360 ARGB Extreme
parts.reason: Premium ROG liquid cooler for the no-budget build.
parts.compatibility: Needs a case with 360mm radiator support.
parts.priceNote: Estimated price. Actual price can change by store, sale, and stock.
